message:
Command `
# Synthesis failed. Check the Yosys log
RUN_DIR="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"

echo "=== Step 76 Yosys synthesis log ==="
ls -la "$RUN_DIR/76-yosys-synthesis/" 2>/dev/null

echo ""
echo "=== Yosys synthesis log tail ==="
tail -50 "$RUN_DIR/76-yosys-synthesis/yosys-synthesis.log" 2>/dev/null
` executed with exit code 0.
